# @platform/adapters-opentelemetry

OpenTelemetry adapter: distributed tracing, metrics export, and telemetry SDK implementation for the observability interface.

## Package identity

```text
Name: @platform/adapters-opentelemetry
Version: 0.1.0
Component: adapters-opentelemetry
Type: library
System: enterprise-react-platform
Domain: operations
Bounded context: telemetry
Owner: team-platform
```

## Lifecycle

```text
Stage: active
Role: adapter
Class: active.adapter
Catalog lifecycle: production
Visibility: internal
Support level: standard
Review cadence: quarterly
```

## Ownership

```text
Owner: team-platform
Change control: owner-review
Promotion eligible: true
Semver policy: internal-traceable
```

## Responsibilities

- Implement the observability tracer interface using the OpenTelemetry SDK
- Configure OTLP exporter with collector endpoint from config-runtime
- Auto-instrument HTTP, database, and queue spans where possible
- Export platform metrics via the OTLP metrics exporter

## Non-responsibilities

- Does not define the observability interface (owned by observability)
- Does not own error capture or alerting (owned by adapters-sentry)
- Does not configure the OpenTelemetry Collector or Jaeger deployment

## Public exports and usage

```text
Public exports only: true
Deep imports allowed: false
```

- Initialized once at application startup before any I/O occurs to ensure full instrumentation
- Imported by platform packages needing explicit span creation

application
platform
```

domain
contract
ui
feature
```

### Depends on

```

### Provides APIs

otel-metrics-exporter
```

### Consumes APIs

```text
observability-core
config-service
OpenTelemetry SDK
```

## Operational notes

- SDK must be initialized before all other imports to enable auto-instrumentation
- Collector endpoint and service name are resolved from config-runtime
